plugins.name: Header Clock
plugins.description: Adds a 'Now' button to the header that toasts the current time. Useful as a minimal reference for registerHeaderButton.
plugins.author: easyDBAccess reference

plugins.name: Image URL Renderer
plugins.description: Renders cells whose value is an image URL as an inline . Apply by setting a column's renderer to "image-url".
plugins.author: easyDBAccess reference

plugins.name: Email Renderer
plugins.description: Renders email-shaped values as mailto: links. Apply by setting a column's renderer to "email".
plugins.author: easyDBAccess reference
